zh.Sheffield, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾雪菲爾
zh.Adlington, Lancashire, England, United K: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾阿德林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Rhodes於1521年10月6日出生在英國爾切斯特時，他的父親Sir Thomas De Rode43歲，母親Margaret Davenport20歲。他於1552年11月22日與Alice Moreton在英國越可爾希霍爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1585年9月25日在英國越可爾希霍爾享年63歲，埋葬在英國越可爾希霍爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Rhodes于1521年10月6日出生在英国爾切斯特时，他的父亲Sir Thomas De Rode43岁，母亲Margaret Davenport20岁。他于1552年11月22日与Alice Moreton在英国越可爾希霍爾结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1585年9月25日在英国越可爾希霍爾享年63岁，埋葬在英国越可爾希霍爾。

nameMeanings.name: Rhodes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: either a topographic name for someone who lived by ‘(the) woodland clearings’, plural form of Middle English rode (Old English rod, rodu), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, principally Rhodes in Bury (Lancashire) or possibly from one of the many minor places in Yorkshire similarly named, or Rhodes Minnis (Kent). The Yorkshire name sometimes alternates with the singular form (see Rhode and Rode ). The Rh- spelling was introduced in the 16th and 17th centuries by clerks with a classical education, who associated the name with the Greek island of Rhodes, famous in ancient history and mythology. There is also no connection with modern English road (Old English rād ‘riding’), which was not used to denote a thoroughfare until the 16th century. The surname is particularly common in Yorkshire and Lancashire but occurs with various spellings in smaller numbers widely across England.
variant of Rhode , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Rhodus
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Rhodes or German Rhodius, a Latinized form of Rode , perhaps indicating the personal as opposed to the topographic name (see Rode 1).

variants.name: Rod
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Rod, or a topographic name for somene who lived in a woodland clearing, from a derivative of Middle High German roden ‘to clear land for cultivation’. Compare Rhodes .
Norwegian (Rød): habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads so named, from Old Norse ruth ‘clearing’.
Czech and Croatian: from a short form of the Slavic compound personal names based on the element rod ‘family, relatives’, e.g. Rodoslav.

variants.name: Roades
meanings: English: variant of   Rhodes  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Rhode
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English rode (Old English rod, rodu) designating someone who lived by a woodland clearing, or for someone who came from a place so named, such as Road (Somerset), Rhode (Somerset), Road Farm in Colebrook (Devon), Rhode in Halberton (Devon), Roade (Northamptonshire), Rode (Cheshire), and Rodd (Herefordshire).
English: topographic name for someone who lived by a reed bed, from Middle English rode (Old English hrēod). See also Rude and Trude .
German: habitational name from any places called Rhode (Lower Saxony, Rhineland) and Rhoden (Hesse, Saxony-Anhalt, former Silesia).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Rhodes was born on 6 October 1521, in Chester, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas De Rode, was 43 and his mother, Margaret Davenport, was 20. He married Alice Moreton on 22 November 1552, in Hipperholme, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 September 1585, in Hipperholme, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Hipperholme, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Rhodes est né le 6 octobre 1521, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas De Rode, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Margaret Davenport, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Alice Moreton le 22 novembre 1552, à Hipperholme, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 septembre 1585, à Hipperholme, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Hipperholme, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Rhodes am 6. Oktober 1521 in Chester, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas De Rode 43 und seine Mutter Margaret Davenport 20. Er hat am 22. November 1552 in Hipperholme, Yorkshire, England Alice Moreton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. September 1585 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Hipperholme, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Hipperholme, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Rhodes è nato il il 6 ottobre 1521 nel Chester, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas De Rode, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Davenport, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Alice Moreton il 22 novembre 1552, nel Hipperholme, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 settembre 1585, nel Hipperholme, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Hipperholme, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Rhodesが1521年10月6日にイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas De Rodeは43歳，母Margaret Davenportは20歳であった。1552年11月22日にイギリスヨークシュアイアヒップエロールメでAlice Moretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1585年9月25日にイギリスヨークシュアイアヒップエロールメで63歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヒップエロールメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Rhodes(이)가 1521년 10월 6일 영국 체실르 체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas De Rode(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Davenport(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1552년 11월 22일 영국 요르크실르 히p홀에서 Alice Moreton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1585년 9월 25일 영국 요르크실르 히p홀에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 히p홀에 묻혔다.

pt.6 October 1521–25 September 1585: 6 de outubro de 1521–25 de setembro de 1585
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Rhodes nasceu em 6 de outubro de 1521, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas De Rode, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Davenport, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Moreton em 22 de novembro de 1552, em Hipperholme, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de setembro de 1585, em Hipperholme, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Hipperholme, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Rhodes родился 6 октября 1521 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas De Rode было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Davenport, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Moreton 22 ноября 1552 г. в местности хиппиролм, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 сентября 1585 г. в местности хиппиролм, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности хиппиролм, еркшир, Англия.

es.6 October 1521–25 September 1585: 6 de octubre de 1521–25 de septiembre de 1585
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Rhodes nació el 6 de octubre de 1521, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas De Rode, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Margaret Davenport, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Alice Moreton el 22 de noviembre de 1552, en Hipperholme, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de septiembre de 1585, en Hipperholme, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Hipperholme, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
